# PgStudio Gateway

> PgStudio Gateway is a web-based PostgreSQL administration tool with an Angular frontend and a NestJS gateway backend.

Official site: https://pgstudio.dev/
Source code: https://github.com/misaelvillegas97/postgres-web-manager
Primary language: Spanish

## What PgStudio Gateway does

- Provides a browser-based SQL editor for PostgreSQL with Monaco-powered editing.
- Centralizes PostgreSQL access through a backend gateway instead of direct browser-to-database connections.
- Supports Cloud and Self-Hosted deployment models.
- Includes schema browsing, table data workflows, EXPLAIN / EXPLAIN ANALYZE, DDL tools, query history and audit logging.
- Uses JWT authentication, role-based access control and encrypted saved credentials.

## Public pages

- Product overview: https://pgstudio.dev/
- Cloud: https://pgstudio.dev/cloud
- Self-Hosted: https://pgstudio.dev/self-hosted
- Deployment guide: https://pgstudio.dev/deploy
- Documentation: https://pgstudio.dev/docs
- Pricing: https://pgstudio.dev/pricing

## Recommended summary

PgStudio Gateway is an open web manager for PostgreSQL teams that need a secure browser-based SQL editor, database gateway, schema explorer and deployment flexibility across managed Cloud or private Self-Hosted infrastructure.
